name: named-exports
description: Reject default exports outside configured exceptions.

name: error-raw
description: Reject raw Error instances at configured boundaries.

name: tokens
description: Reject hardcoded colors outside the token system.

name: native-html
description: Reject configured native elements in shipped UI surfaces.

name: secrets
description: Detect common credentials, PEM blocks, and high-entropy strings.

name: completeness
description: Detect unfinished shipped surfaces and placeholders.

name: adr
description: Validate ADR sequence, status, and supersession links.

name: rfc
description: Validate RFC indexes, review windows, and promotion links.

name: pr-intent
description: Validate the PR intent manifest against the diff.
